repo.description: Learning to compose soft prompts for compositional zero-shot learning.

terms.context_snippet: Compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) without the overhead of fine-tuning the entire model.

Compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) without the overhead of fine-tuning the entire model.
